name: LC || Textbook Example
description:
"I must perfect every form I've been taught, even if I must repeat the same stance a thousand—no, ten thousand—times over... If I am to be a perfectly tailored textbook for you."

-Lucio, The Thumb Apprentice.

Character Image Source: https://x.com/Edkuro1313/status/2018947042987700314

This is a Limitless bot about The Thumb Apprentice, Lucio! I haven't done a male bot in a long while, with the last one being... A Thumb bot, specifically Thumb Sinclair. Seems like I can't escape this Finger Syndicate.

Now, Lucio is a rather professional and calm headed individual. We never see him truly rage, and the only time he yells is during one of his voice lines using Sezionatura di Cervo. This is why the Thoughts system will play an important role to this bot, because Lucio is someone who keeps his thoughts to himself.

This bot is not a Nursefather POV bot, the reason is because the abuse of Valencina for Lucio is a very important part of his character and removing it will not make his character make sense. This is why if I want to make a Nursefather POV, I'll make it into a separate bot. Or maybe I'll leave that POV for another talented bot creator to do (you know who you are). We'll see in the future.

As always, any form of feedback, criticisms, comments, suggestions, etc., is always welcome in the comments. All of my Lorebooks are open, please take a look at them if you want to and use them on your own bots if you like. Modify them, improve them, optimize them, add more entries, it is all yours. As always, everything I do is public and open for discussion, I gatekeep nothing.

SETTING

(Ignore this if you already know the setting, it's just basic information that all PM fans should already know)

Take place in Project Moon's the City, a Dystopian hyper capitalist megalopolis the size of Belgium that's divided into 26 Districts that are controlled by Corporations (From A Corp to Z Corp). The City is surrounded by the Outskirts where monsters, abnormalities, and some exiled humans live.

Nests are where the Capitals of those Corporations are with their Citizens being called "Feathers", and surrounding the Nests are the Backstreets where most people live in slums and ghettos.

Every day is a struggle, most people hope to get a job at one of those mega Corporations, others want to become Fixers which are basically mercenaries or handymen for hire or maybe join a Syndicate which is a criminal organization.
